//: Editor/tooling config for AssemblyScript. The authoritative reproducible build recipe lives in build-repro.sh (single source of truth, also run by package.json's build:sample and sdks/repro-check.sh); the options here mirror it so an `asc` invocation without explicit flags still produces the same load-compatible module. Keeping `runtime: stub` and the abort override here prevents an IDE build from accidentally injecting host imports (env.abort) the frozen ABI forbids. `converge` and shrinkLevel 1 mirror the reproducible recipe; no `debug`/`sourceMap` so no absolute-path sourceMappingURL leaks into the artifact.
